STATUS: AVAILABLE FOR INTERNSHIPS

Building
AI Systems

2nd year BS student at IIT Patna specializing in Artificial Intelligence & Cybersecurity. Passionate about decentralized systems, machine learning, and building things that matter.

ACCESS LOGS → INITIATE COMMS

Explore Core Data

Check out my latest AI models, cybersecurity scripts, and open-source contributions.

GitHub Repository

Join the Network

Follow my journey on YouTube where I dive deep into AI developments and cybersecurity.

Video Feed

Player Profile

Who I Am

A builder, learner, and problem-solver at the intersection of AI and security.

I'm Mayank Raj, a second-year BS student at IIT Patna pursuing Artificial Intelligence & Cybersecurity — two fields I believe will define the next decade of technology. With a 9.53 CGPA, I've consistently pushed myself to go beyond the classroom.

Before IIT, I led a technical team in Nepal for two years, managed full project lifecycles, and contributed to community-building at Rotary's Interact Club. That hands-on experience taught me that the best technology is built for real people with real problems.

I also spent time as a Social Media Manager at Orgazz Enterprises, where I learned to communicate complex ideas visually — a skill that makes me a more well-rounded engineer.

🎓
IIT Patna · Lvl 2BS in AI & Cybersecurity · CGPA 9.53/10
🛡️
Cybersecurity ClassDeloitte Forage certified · Secure systems design
🧠
AI & ML SpecHCL GUVI certified · Satellite ML models
🌐
Region: Nepal + IndiaCross-cultural tech leadership background

Quest Log

Experience

From Nepal's startup scene to India's premier tech institute — a journey built on real work.

🚀
Sep 2025 – Feb 2026
Social Media Manager
Orgazz Enterprises LLP · Noida, India
  • Led development of the company's e-commerce website and end-to-end graphic design system
  • Applied data-driven marketing insights to grow the startup's online presence from the ground up
  • Produced reels, stories, polls, and graphic content for multi-platform social media engagement
⚡
Sep 2020 – Sep 2022
Tech Team Lead
The Gream Project · Nepal
  • Managed end-to-end project lifecycles, developing strong leadership and problem-solving skills
  • Directed the technical team to successful completion of multiple projects over two years
🤝
Feb 2020 – Feb 2022
Technical Team Member
Interact — Rotary Sponsored Club · Nepal
  • Contributed to community event execution, improving local outreach and engagement
  • Provided technical support and collaborated within cross-functional team environments

Active Loadouts

Projects

Real problems. Real solutions. Built to matter.

May 2026 · BS Capstone, Semester 2
🔗
Lifelong Medical Records Ledger (LMRL)
A decentralized health data framework built for India using secure ledger technology. Privacy-first and tamper-resistant.
Dec 2025
🌍
Illegal Logging Detection Model
An AI model that ingests satellite imagery and applies machine learning to identify unregulated logging practices.

Skill Tree

Capabilities

A versatile stack — from building models to shipping product.

Ready to start a new quest?

Whether you're a startup looking for a versatile tech collaborator, a researcher exploring AI + security, or just someone with a cool idea — I'm always open to a conversation.
